# Learn Katakana

A completely free, interactive web application to practice Japanese Katakana writing. No account required.

- **URL:** https://katakana.site/
- **Description:** Master katakana with our completely free interactive app — no account required. Practice Japanese writing with stroke order guides, instant feedback, and beautiful themes. Perfect for beginners learning Japanese.
- **Features:** Stroke order guides, Interactive drawing canvas, Progress tracking, Multiple themes, Dark mode, Mobile optimized.
- **Author:** Andrew James Napier
